briefs.title: BC Drug Plans Expanded: Insulin Pricing Rules Change and Provider Billing Rules Tighten
briefs.summary: Effective March 1, 2026, BC is adding a new drug plan (Plan NP) for all medicare beneficiaries, removing the insulin exemption from drug price rules, and banning pharmacies from charging patients extra for any fully covered drug benefit.
briefs.action_required: Review your billing practices to ensure you never charge patients extra for any drug benefit fully covered under a BC drug plan.

key_dates.label: BC Drug Plans amendments (Plan NP, insulin pricing, provider billing rules) take effect
